title: superbot-idle theme pack — schema v1
description: A data-only theme pack (themes/<name>.yaml). Human-readable twin: docs/theme-schema.md (field-for-field parity is test-enforced). Unknown top-level keys are rejected everywhere (additionalProperties: false) so a theme cannot smuggle new mechanics. String budgets are hard limits derived from chat-embed caps (title 256, field value 1024, 25 fields per embed): every render slot fits by construction, so overflow is a red gate, never a live render bug.

schema_version.description: Theme-schema version this pack targets. v1 packs declare exactly 1; a future v2 bumps this and the gate validates each pack against its declared version.

theme.description: Theme identity + the embed frame (title, description, color).

id.description: Stable machine id of the theme (slug).

name.description: Player-visible theme name; composes into embed titles (budget 64 of the 256-char title cap, leaving headroom for emoji + suffixes).

description.description: Theme flavor text; renders as the embed description / a field value (1024-char cap).

currencies.description: Display skins for the engine's currency ids. 1-5 entries: together with the 20-generator cap, any per-entry render stays within the 25-fields-per-embed cap.

id.description: Engine currency id this skin maps onto.

name.description: Player-visible currency name; renders in field names/titles.

description.description: Currency flavor text; renders as a field value (1024-char cap).

generators.description: Display skins + base rates for the engine's generator ids. 1-20 entries (see currencies for the 25-field budget math).

id.description: Engine generator id this skin maps onto.

name.description: Player-visible generator name; renders in field names/titles.

description.description: Generator flavor text; renders as a field value (1024-char cap).

produces.description: Currency id this generator produces; MUST reference a declared currencies[].id (referential check lives in the gate — not expressible here).

base_rate.description: Units of `produces` per generator per second. Bounded 1-1000 in v1 so a theme cannot smuggle economy balance; baseline numbers are slated to move engine-side (bounded multipliers) in the economy slice.

upgrades.description: OPTIONAL (added in slice (b), additive within v1). Display skins for engine upgrade ids. 1-20 entries: upgrades render on their OWN shop embed, so the 25-fields-per-embed cap holds with headroom. DATA ONLY: cost curves, effect sizes and every other economy number live engine-side (idle_engine/economy.py, pre-registered in docs/design/upgrades-prestige-v0.md) — a numeric field here is rejected by additionalProperties.

id.description: Engine upgrade id this skin maps onto.

name.description: Player-visible upgrade name; renders in field names/titles.

description.description: Upgrade flavor text; composed into the shop field value below the cost line (shop-composition slice). Budget 768 by composition arithmetic: description (768) + newline (1) + themed cost-line text (mark 1 + level label 32 + currency emoji 32 + currency name 64 + separators 10 = 139) + digit floor (116) = the 1024-char field-value cap exactly. Tightened from the generic 1024 flavor budget when the render layer first consumed this field — the field rendered NOWHERE before, so no render contract relied on the wider budget, and every shipped pack passes unchanged (catalog max at the tighten: 100 chars).

target.description: Generator id this upgrade boosts; MUST reference a declared generators[].id (referential check lives in the gate — not expressible here).

labels.description: OPTIONAL (added in the themed-label-slots slice, additive within v1). Themed overrides for the labels the render layer otherwise fills with neutral scaffolding (docs/render-layer.md). EVERY slot inside is optional — an absent slot falls back to the neutral default, so packs without this block render exactly as before. Budgets leave documented headroom for the numeric substitutions (arithmetic in docs/theme-schema.md § labels).

offline_return.description: Flavor line for offline gains in the status view. TEMPLATE: must contain the substitution token {gains} exactly once and no other braces (gate check); the render layer replaces that token with the formatted gains text (clamped to fit) and appends the whole line to the theme description. Budget 256 (token included): 1024 description + 2 joiner + 249 fixed template chars leaves >= 2821 of the 4096 description cap for the substituted gains.

status_title.description: Themed title for the status view, rendered VERBATIM (replaces the neutral '{emoji} {name}' composition). Nothing is composed into it, so the budget is the full 256-char title cap.

shop_title.description: Themed title for the upgrade-shop view, rendered VERBATIM (replaces the neutral '{emoji} {name}' composition). Nothing is composed into it, so the budget is the full 256-char title cap.

shop_description.description: Themed description for the upgrade-shop view, rendered VERBATIM as the embed description (replaces theme.description there). Budget 1024 = flavor-text budget, well under the 4096 description cap.

level.description: Themed level label in shop field values (replaces the neutral 'Lv'). Composes as '{mark} {level} N -> N+1 · cost {emoji} {name}' inside the 1024-char field value: mark+label+emoji+name+separators <= ~140 chars, leaving >= 880 for digits before the numeric clamp.

prestige_progress.description: Themed label for the prestige view's progress value (the neutral default is the bare numbers). Composes as '{mark} {label} N / M' inside the 1024-char field value: mark+label+separators <= ~70 chars, leaving >= 950 for digits before the numeric clamp.

milestones.description: OPTIONAL (added in the achievements slice, additive within v1). Noun skins for the engine-derived milestone slots. The slot SET is mechanics (CORE side): every pack gets the same pre-registered threshold ladders (idle_engine/economy.py, docs/design/achievements-v0.md) — three 'owned' rungs (total generators owned), three 'lifetime' rungs (run-lifetime earnings of the measured currency), and, when the pack declares a prestige block, three 'prestige' rungs (prestige units held). An entry here skins ONE canonical slot id with name/flavor/emoji; any subset may be skinned, and an unskinned slot renders as neutral scaffolding. DATA ONLY: thresholds, bonus percents and track bindings live engine-side — a numeric or mechanical field here is rejected by additionalProperties. The prestige-* ids require the pack's prestige block (gate check — a noun for a slot that does not exist is a red gate).

id.description: Canonical engine milestone slot id being skinned (kind-rank over the three pre-registered ladders).

name.description: Player-visible milestone name; renders in the achievements view's field names ({emoji} {name}, 32 + 64 of the 256-char cap).

description.description: Milestone flavor text; composed into the achievements field value below the progress line (same two-tier arithmetic as the shop value: description (768) + newline (1) leaves >= 255 for the number-bearing progress line, which clamps — the description itself never truncates).

prestige.description: OPTIONAL (added in slice (b), additive within v1). Display skin for the engine's prestige track: which declared currency is the persistent prestige currency, which declared currency's lifetime earnings it measures, and the reset action's nouns. Thresholds and award curves live engine-side (idle_engine/economy.py) — a numeric field here is rejected by additionalProperties.

currency.description: Currency id of the persistent prestige currency; MUST reference a declared currencies[].id and differ from `measures` (gate check).

measures.description: Currency id whose lifetime earnings drive eligibility/award; MUST reference a declared currencies[].id and differ from `currency` (gate check).

action_name.description: Player-visible name of the reset action; renders in buttons/titles.

action_description.description: Reset action flavor text; renders as a field value (1024-char cap).
